case_title: DEXTER YOUNG VS. BETHANY TULLY et al

docket_entries.description: AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,565.67 FILED BY YOUNG, DEXTER AS TO DEFENDANT TULLY, BETHANY TULLY, GREGORY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-14-2014 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
TRIAL RESET TO JUL-30-2014 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506 TRIAL OF JUL-14-2014 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR

REQUEST TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF YOUNG, DEXTER ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF YOUNG, DEXTER AS TO DEFENDANT TULLY, BETHANY
CASE DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE AS TO GREGORY TULLY BY COURT AT SMALL CLAIM HEARING OF JUL-14-2014 AT 3:30 PM.
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT TULLY, BETHANY
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF YOUNG, DEXTER AS TO DEFENDANT TULLY, GREGORY
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FEE FOR SERVICE $ 0.00 - SERVED JUN-18-2014, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT TULLY, BETHANY

PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF ENVELOPE STAMPED, "REFUSED - RETURN TO SENDER - ATTEMPTED - NOT KNOWN - UNABLE TO FORWARD." COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED UNSERVED AS TO DEFENDANT TULLY, BETHANY
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-14-2014 - JUDGMENT.
DECLARATION OF NON-SERVICE. REQUEST FOR A NEW COURT DATE. FILED BY PLAINTIFF YOUNG, DEXTER

PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF ENVELOPE STAMPED "REFUSED - RETURN TO SENDER - ATTEMPTED - NOT KNOWN - UNABLE TO FORWARD." COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED UNSERVED AS TO DEFENDANT TULLY, GREGORY
PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM, ADVANCED PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF FROM JUL-30-2014 TO SMALL CLAIMS - CLAIM CALENDAR ON JUL-14-2014 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUL-14-2014 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUL-14-2014 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT EXCEPT DEFENDANT GREGORY TULLY WHO WAS NOT PRESENT. NO COSTS, IFP FILED BY PLAINTIFF. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
DECLARATION OF NEW MAILING ADDRESS FOR BOTH DEFENDANTS. FILED BY PLAINTIFF YOUNG, DEXTER
REQUEST TO POSTPONE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING (REQUEST TO ADVANCE) FILED BY PLAINTIFF YOUNG, DEXTER
ORDER (SC-152) ON REQUEST TO ADVANCE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING - GRANTED.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF YOUNG, DEXTER RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT TULLY, BETHANY $1,565.67 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,565.67, AT PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST, PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM AGAINST GREGORY TULLY IS DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE--NO PROOF OF SERVICE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
